text: A small crowd watching a man and dog with frisbees.
A display of several different pastries topped with icing and/or fruit.
A large room with all white furniture and dark wood floors.
A woman and man on the beach flying a kite.
A pair of zebras feeding out of a bin in their pen.
A picture of a family in their living room watching a TV and visiting together.
There are three buses parked under a canopy.
A woman holding a child in a  grassy field
A girl sitting in front of a piece of cake and cup of coffee.
A young man chasing a tennis ball while holding a tennis racquet.
